metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: stancl
plugins.description: Skills for the stancl ecosystem: tenancy, jobpipeline, virtualcolumn

plugins.name: agnz
plugins.description: Sandboxed local-model agent for Claude Code. Exposes an MCP server so Claude can converse with a locally-hosted LLM (LM Studio, Ollama, any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) that has its own scoped file-system access and memory.
